root_text.an2.118:1.4: Imā kho, bhikkhave, dve āsā duppajahā”ti.
root_text.an2.119:1.3: Yo ca pubbakārī, yo ca kataññū katavedī.
root_text.an2.119:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, dve puggalā dullabhā lokasmin”ti.
root_text.an2.120:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, dve puggalā dullabhā lokasmin”ti.
root_text.an2.121:1.3: Yo ca laddhaṁ laddhaṁ nikkhipati, yo ca laddhaṁ laddhaṁ vissajjeti.
root_text.an2.121:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, dve puggalā duttappayā”ti.
root_text.an2.122:1.3: Yo ca laddhaṁ laddhaṁ na nikkhipati, yo ca laddhaṁ laddhaṁ na vissajjeti.
root_text.an2.122:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, dve puggalā sutappayā”ti.
root_text.an2.123:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, dve paccayā rāgassa uppādāyā”ti.
root_text.an2.124:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, dve paccayā dosassa uppādāyā”ti.
root_text.an2.125:1.3: Parato ca ghoso ayoniso ca manasikāro.
root_text.an2.125:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, dve paccayā micchādiṭṭhiyā uppādāyā”ti.
root_text.an2.126:1.3: Parato ca ghoso, yoniso ca manasikāro.
root_text.an2.126:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, dve paccayā sammādiṭṭhiyā uppādāyā”ti.
root_text.an2.127:1.3: Lahukā ca āpatti, garukā ca āpatti.
root_text.an2.128:1.3: Duṭṭhullā ca āpatti, aduṭṭhullā ca āpatti.
root_text.an2.129:1.3: Sāvasesā ca āpatti, anavasesā ca āpatti.

translation_text.an2.118:0.2: The Chapter on Hopes That Are Hard to Give Up
translation_text.an2.118:1.1: “These two hopes are hard to give up.
translation_text.an2.118:1.3: The hope for wealth and the hope for long life.
translation_text.an2.118:1.4: These are two hopes that are hard to give up.”
translation_text.an2.119:1.1: “These two individuals are rare in the world.
translation_text.an2.119:1.3: One who takes the initiative, and one who is grateful and thankful.
translation_text.an2.119:1.4: These are the two individuals who are rare in the world.”
translation_text.an2.120:1.1: “These two individuals are rare in the world.
translation_text.an2.120:1.3: One who is satisfied, and one who satisfies others.
translation_text.an2.120:1.4: These are the two individuals who are rare in the world.”
translation_text.an2.121:1.1: “These two individuals are hard to satisfy in the world.
translation_text.an2.121:1.3: One who continually hoards wealth, and one who continually wastes wealth.
translation_text.an2.121:1.4: These are the two individuals who are hard to satisfy in the world.”
translation_text.an2.122:1.1: “These two individuals are easy to satisfy in the world.
translation_text.an2.122:1.3: One who does not continually hoard wealth, and one who does not continually waste wealth.
translation_text.an2.122:1.4: These are the two individuals who are easy to satisfy in the world.”
translation_text.an2.123:1.1: “There are two conditions for the arising of greed.
translation_text.an2.123:1.3: The feature of beauty and irrational application of mind.
translation_text.an2.123:1.4: These are the two conditions for the arising of greed.”
translation_text.an2.124:1.1: “There are two conditions for the arising of hate.
translation_text.an2.124:1.3: The feature of harshness and irrational application of mind.
translation_text.an2.124:1.4: These are the two conditions for the arising of hate.”
translation_text.an2.125:1.1: “There are two conditions for the arising of wrong view.
translation_text.an2.125:1.3: The voice of another and irrational application of mind.
translation_text.an2.125:1.4: These are the two conditions for the arising of wrong view.”
translation_text.an2.126:1.1: “There are two conditions for the arising of right view.
translation_text.an2.126:1.3: The voice of another and rational application of mind.
translation_text.an2.126:1.4: These are the two conditions for the arising of right view.”
translation_text.an2.127:1.3: A light offense and a serious offense.
translation_text.an2.128:1.3: An offense with corrupt intention and an offense without corrupt intention.
translation_text.an2.129:1.3: An offense requiring rehabilitation and an offense not requiring rehabilitation.
